observed.error: opencode-ai postinstall script was not run

rootCauseContract: The cross-platform opencode-ai package requires a lifecycle script to replace its stub with an optional platform binary, while the safe package builder intentionally disables arbitrary lifecycle scripts.
regressionChecks: the builder packages the official architecture-specific artifact directly
the native binary passes a no-network unprivileged version preflight
failed cross-platform package attempts remove their partial volumes
